title: ERC-20 Transfer History
body: Fetch full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet, optionally filtered by token contract.

title: Historical Portfolio Value
body: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day — build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers.

title: Native Token Balance
body: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.

title: Net Worth Calculator
body: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.

title: Portfolio History
body: 30-day historical portfolio value over time — asset-by-asset breakdown per day.

title: Portfolio Tracker
body: Monitor multi-chain portfolio value and asset composition in real time.

title: Transaction History
body: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.

title: Wallet Activity Feed
body: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.

title: Wallet Age & Summary
body: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet — the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.

title: Wallet Attestations
body: Surface onchain attestations and reputation signals for any wallet address.

title: Wallet Balances Skill
body: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.
